[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001011 4
1 00110010 3
2 01111111 7
3 11011100 5
4 01001011 4
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a

01 10 11100111 6
12 21 11111111 a match 5 6 7
23 32 10111101 6
34 43 11101110 6
45 54 11111110 7
56 65 00110111 5
67 76 10110111 6
70 07 10110111 6

02 20 00111111 6
13 31 11100111 6
24 42 11111111 a match 5 6 7
35 53 10110100 4
46 64 11101111 7
57 75 10110100 4
60 06 00100011 3
71 17 11110111 7

14 41 11101111 7
25 52 00111101 5
36 63 10100011 4
47 74 11111110 7
50 05 00110111 5
61 16 11100111 6
72 27 10111101 6

04 40 11101111 7
15 51 11110111 7
26 62 00111111 6
37 73 10110100 4
